name: language
normalization_rule: Map English/default to 'en' and Hindi, Hinglish, or Devanagari text to 'hi-IN'

name: consent
description: Whether the customer agrees to continue with qualification questions
normalization_rule: Map yes/haan/sure to true and no/nahin/not now to false

name: interest
description: Whether the customer is interested in a personal loan
normalization_rule: Map affirmative product intent to true and rejection/disinterest to false

name: city
normalization_rule: Strip spaces and title-case city names

name: employment_type
normalization_rule: Normalize to salaried or self_employed using keyword mapping

name: monthly_income
normalization_rule: Convert formats like 35k, 35 thousand, 3.5 lakh into integer INR

name: loan_amount
description: Requested personal loan amount in INR
normalization_rule: Convert formats like 2 lakh, 250000, 4.5 lacs into integer INR

name: age
normalization_rule: Capture explicit age statements like age 27 or I am 30 years old

name: existing_monthly_emi
description: Current total EMI burden per month in INR
normalization_rule: Convert spoken EMI burden to integer INR

name: loan_purpose
description: Reason for taking the personal loan
normalization_rule: Normalize to wedding, medical, travel, home_renovation, education, debt_consolidation, or other

name: callback_time
description: Preferred callback time if the customer is busy
normalization_rule: Keep as trimmed free text for later scheduling

name: human_assistance_requested
description: Whether the customer explicitly requested a human representative
normalization_rule: Map human/callback to true when explicitly requested
